name: Business Bank, the
description_short: The Business Bank is a local FDIC-insured bank offering commercial and personal banking with unlimited interest-checking accounts, competitive APY rates, and bundled services for small business owners.
description_long: The Business Bank positions itself as a community-focused financial institution emphasizing local expertise and personalized service. Founded on the principle of 'local banking done right,' the bank combines experienced local banking professionals with modern technology to serve both small business owners and personal customers in their markets. The bank's primary offerings include commercial bundled banking with unlimited checking accounts that earn interest, full fraud protection, payment services (ACH, wire transfer, bill payment), and mobile/remote deposit capabilities. On the personal side, they offer Personal Interest Checking accounts earning up to 3.30% APY, online debit card management, $50 monthly ATM service charge reimbursement, and zero overdraft or NSF fees. Both personal and business customers have access to online and mobile banking platforms. What distinguishes The Business Bank is their emphasis on local market knowledge and relationship banking. CEO Geoffrey R. Hesslink highlights the institution's speed, nimbleness, and responsiveness to customer needs. The bank touts a team of experienced local experts and includes testimonials from satisfied business customers like Pete's Beer Barn, suggesting strong community ties and customized solutions for local entrepreneurs. As a regional community bank, The Business Bank appears strongest for customers prioritizing personal service and local relationships over potential advantages offered by larger national institutions or digital-only banks. However, their website provides limited information about loan products, commercial real estate financing, business credit lines, or other comprehensive commercial banking services that competing regional banks typically advertise prominently.
services: Personal Interest Checking accounts (up to 3.30% APY)
Commercial bundled banking with unlimited checking
Online and mobile banking platform access
pros: Personal Interest Checking accounts offer up to 3.30% APY, competitive for personal banking
Zero overdraft and NSF charges on personal accounts reduce unexpected fees
$50 monthly ATM service charge reimbursement provides domestic ATM flexibility
Commercial bundled banking includes unlimited interest-bearing checking with full fraud protection
ACH, wire transfer, and bill payment services included in commercial packages
Mobile and remote deposit capabilities for both personal and business customers
FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Emphasis on local expertise and responsive customer service from experienced team
cons: Website provides minimal detail on commercial loan products, credit lines, or SBA loan offerings
Limited transparency about fees, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
No information on business credit card products or merchant services despite commercial banking focus
Regional community bank may have limited product range compared to national competitors
Website lacks detail on commercial real estate lending, equipment financing, or working capital solutions
best_for: Small business owners seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making
Personal customers prioritizing high-yield checking accounts with fee waivers over national bank rates
Local entrepreneurs needing bundled commercial banking with payment processing services
Customers who value personal service and familiar banking relationships in their community
diagnosis: The Business Bank is best for small business owners and personal customers who prioritize local relationships, personalized service, and competitive rates on checking accounts within a regional market. The main caveat is that their website lacks transparency about the full breadth of commercial lending products (loans, lines of credit, equipment financing) that business customers typically evaluate when choosing a commercial bank.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Local FDIC-insured bank offering commercial and personal banking with unlimited interest-checking accounts, competitive APY rates, and bundled services.
